package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for path_split_base_only: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `path.Split(...)` when only the base name is used.
type CasePathSplitBaseOnlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePathSplitBaseOnlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePathSplitBaseOnlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePathSplitBaseOnlyModel
}

type CasePathSplitBaseOnlyService struct {
    repo *CasePathSplitBaseOnlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePathSplitBaseOnlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePathSplitBaseOnly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePathSplitBaseOnlyDTO) error {
    focus := "path_split_base_only"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    path_split_base_only_negative := map[string]int{"path": 1, "split": 2, "base": 3, "only": 4}
    path_split_base_only_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    path_negative_0 := path_split_base_only_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_0
    split_negative_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = split_negative_1
    base_negative_2 := path_split_base_only_negative["base"] + len(input)
    _ = base_negative_2
    only_negative_3 := path_split_base_only_negative["only"] + len(input)
    _ = only_negative_3
    return nil
}
